title: PS-69003 PotentialChangeValue will be updated when a SCO linked to a contract is deleted and the PCO items was already linked to the contract.
body: PS-69003 PotentialChangeValue will be updated when a SCO linked to a contract is deleted and the PCO items was already linked to the contract.
author: AbdulRahim1412

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

This PR updates SQL procedure logic for PS-69003 so contract `PotentialChangeValue` is restored when an SCO/PCO item link is deleted, keeping contract potential values aligned with direct PCO item linkage.

**Changes:**
- Adds `PotentialChangeValue` adjustment when deleting `SubContractCOPCOItemLinks`.
- Regenerates `delta_procs.sql` and updates the stored procedure hash.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 3 out of 3 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `Core/SQL/base_procs.sql` | Adds the contract `PotentialChangeValue` update in the canonical stored procedure. |
| `Core/SQL/delta_procs.sql` | Mirrors the stored procedure change for database upgrades, with regenerated refresh-module ordering. |
| `Core/SQL/record_procs_hash.sql` | Updates the procedure hash after SQL regeneration. |
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Copilot reviewed 3 out of 3 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body: This update changes `PotentialChangeValue`, but the contract history entry built below still records only `PotentialValue`. Other contract-value paths that update `PotentialChangeValue` include it in the history XML (for example, `s_enc_add_or_update_SubContractCOPCOItemLinks` and direct PCO item delete), so this path will leave the contract audit history missing the restored potential-change amount. Please capture the old `PotentialChangeValue` and add a corresponding `PotentialChangeValue` history row here as well.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This mirrored procedure update also needs the history XML to include `PotentialChangeValue`; otherwise upgraded databases will update the value but the generated contract history will show only the `PotentialValue` change. Please regenerate/update this block after adding the `PotentialChangeValue` history entry in `base_procs.sql`.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This is the behavior fixed by PS-69003, but there is no regression coverage for deleting an SCO after its PCO item has been direct-linked to the contract and verifying `PotentialChangeValue` is restored. The existing add-link test asserts the inverse transition, so adding a delete-side assertion/test would prevent this accounting path from regressing again.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: Remove the inline "-- wrong order" note from the parameter list. It’s not actionable for callers and makes the generated script look like it contains known defects; if parameter ordering truly matters somewhere, the fix should be to reorder the parameters (and any corresponding call-site docs) rather than leaving a warning comment in the signature.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This procedure performs multiple writes across PotentialCOItems, History, and Contracts without an explicit transaction. In autocommit mode, a runtime failure after the first UPDATE/INSERT can leave partially-applied changes; `SET XACT_ABORT ON` only guarantees rollback of the *current* statement unless the statements are wrapped in a transaction. Consider wrapping the write section (after validation/early returns) in a single `BEGIN TRAN`/`COMMIT` so the unlink + history + contract adjustments are atomic.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: The new Contract `PotentialChangeValue` adjustment on SCO link removal looks correct, but there doesn’t appear to be an integration test covering the specific scenario described in the PR (PCO item was already directly linked to a contract, then linked to an SCO for that contract, then the SCO is deleted). Consider adding a test alongside the existing SubcontractCO delete/link tests (e.g., `Core/Tests/ProjectSight.Tests.ParallelIntegrationTests/Records/SubContractCOs/BusinessRulesTests.cs`) that deletes the SCO and asserts the contract’s `PotentialChangeValue`/`PotentialValue` are restored as expected.
review_comments.author: Copilot

files.patch:
@@ -53802,13 +53802,16 @@ DECLARE
     BEGIN
       DECLARE
         @PotentialValue    money ,
+        @PotentialChangeValue money ,
         @ItemKey           nvarchar(100) ,
         @HistoryEntry      NVARCHAR(MAX) ,
         @ModifiedRecords   ProjectIDRecordIDGUIDTableType
 
       UPDATE Contracts
          SET @PotentialValue      = PotentialValue ,
              PotentialValue       = PotentialValue - @CostAppliedAmount ,
+             @PotentialChangeValue= PotentialChangeValue,
+             PotentialChangeValue = PotentialChangeValue + @CostAppliedAmount,
              LastModified         = @WhenRequested ,
              LastModifiedBy       = @RequestedBy ,
              LastModifiedByUserID = @RequestedByUserID
@@ -53817,12 +53820,19 @@ DECLARE
              INSERTED.GUID
              INTO @ModifiedRecords
        WHERE ContractID = @ContractID
-         AND Deleted = 0
+         AND Deleted = 0;
 
-      SET @HistoryEntry = (SELECT Name = CAST('PotentialValue' AS NVARCHAR(100)),
-                                  NewValue = @PotentialValue - @CostAppliedAmount ,
-                                  OldValue = @PotentialValue
-                           FOR XML RAW)
+         WITH HistoryEntries AS
+                    (SELECT Name = CAST('PotentialChangeValue' AS NVARCHAR(100)),
+                            NewValue = @PotentialChangeValue + @CostAppliedAmount ,
+                            OldValue = @PotentialChangeValue
+
+                     UNION
+
+                     SELECT Name = CAST('PotentialValue' AS NVARCHAR(100)),
+                            NewValue = @PotentialValue - @CostAppliedAmount ,
+                            OldValue = @PotentialValue)
+         SELECT @HistoryEntry = (SELECT * FROM HistoryEntries FOR XML RAW)
 
       SELECT @ItemKey = PCONumber + '-' + @ItemNumber
         FROM PotentialCO
